lead: This machine is treated as a setting-focused page, not as a normal game-count checker page.

summaryBoxes.label: Base plan
summaryBoxes.value: Use the setting tool as the main guide.

summaryBoxes.label: Note
summaryBoxes.value: The article page shows guide text instead of a normal checker.

factTable: Treat this page as a guide for the setting tool.
Open the setting tool from the article page.

sections.title: How to use
body: This machine does not use the normal game-count checker flow on the article page.
Use the article page as a guide page and move to the setting tool when needed.

sections.title: Memo
body: The current structure keeps this machine separate from the normal checker flow.
This article follows the current checker and setting-tool roles.
